examples: The most common CubeSat is a 10cm cube, so small that a single CubeSat could easily be mistaken for a paperweight on your desk.
His eye fell on the fragments of the glass paperweight.
Wait, have you every really looked at a paperweight before?
In almost all cases, water damage results in nothing more than a good-looking paperweight.
And the piece of gadolinium I acquired upon the way is still used as a paperweight.
